title: Technical Electrical Cosmic Chaos
description: Technical Electrical Cosmic Chaos is a sandbox style 1.12.2 pack. Where you are given the freedom to do whatever you want, but now on Modrinth! (Includes Public SMP Server)
body:
**Technical Electrical: Cosmic Chaos** is a spin off to Waddon1's renowned Technical Electrical series. The pack allows you to create an industrialised world, a magic world, create an entirely different world, or destroy the world these choices are up to you! Technical Electrical's philosophy is that one mod for one use, which helps keep the pack light by not including mods for the sake of it, they are all carefully chosen to help keep resource usage low, while having a fun modded experience. 

Technical Electrical Cosmic Chaos includes mods like:
- Mekanism by AidanCBrady
- Cyberware by Flaxbeard
- Portality by Buuz135
- Galacticraft-Legacy by TeamGalacticraft

Also includes
Jade from Curseforge [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade]

If you need any help or want to talk to people on the server join the modpack Discord
